summary: Iteration 78: Complete testing of enhanced Annual Pricing Config with Calculate-Pricing endpoint. All 18 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend features verified working.

tests.description: GET /api/admin/subscribers/calculate-pricing returns breakdown, subtotals, overall_discount_pct, final_totals
Each breakdown item has name, duration_value, duration_unit, source_tier, discount_pct, monthly_prices, calculated_prices, matched_program
AWRP fuzzy matches to 'Atomic Weight Release Program (AWRP)', pulls 1 Month tier prices (INR 90000.01, USD 1800, AED 4500)
Money Magic Multiplier matches and pulls correct prices (INR 20000, USD 325, AED 1200)
Bi-Annual Downloads and Quarterly Meetups (sessions type) have zero monetary values
Subtotals correctly sum all program calculated_prices
PUT pricing config accepts source_tier field in included_programs
PUT pricing config accepts discount_pct field in included_programs
Per-program discount_pct is applied: calculated = monthly * duration * (1 - discount/100)
Overall discount is applied: final_totals = subtotals * (1 - overall_discount/100)

details: Programs table shows columns: Program name, Duration, Unit, Source Tier, Discount %
AWRP row: name input, 12 months, Source Tier dropdown (1 Month), Discount % input (0)
Money Magic Multiplier row: name input, 6 months, Source Tier dropdown (1 Month), Discount % input (0)
Bi-Annual Downloads row: name input, 2 sessions, '-' for Source Tier, '-' for Discount
Quarterly Meetups row: name input, 4 sessions, '-' for Source Tier, '-' for Discount
Add program row with input field, duration value, unit dropdown, + button
'Calculate Pricing' button visible in Package Config section
Clicking saves config and returns breakdown via GET /api/admin/subscribers/calculate-pricing
Breakdown table appears with Program, Duration, Source, Monthly INR, Disc %, Total INR/USD/AED columns
AWRP: 12 months, 1 Month source, 90,000.01 monthly INR, 1,080,000.12 total INR, 21,600 USD, 54,000 AED
Money Magic Multiplier: 6 months, 1 Month source, 20,000 monthly INR, 120,000 total INR, 1,950 USD, 7,200 AED
Bi-Annual Downloads: 2 sessions, '-' source, 0 monthly, 0 totals
Quarterly Meetups: 4 sessions, '-' source, 0 monthly, 0 totals
Subtotal row: 1,200,000.12 INR, 23,550 USD, 61,200 AED
Annual Package Price row in purple: 1,200,000.12 INR, 23,550 USD, 61,200 AED
When overall_discount_pct > 0, 'Overall Discount (X%)' row appears in red
Tested with 20%: shows -240,000.024 INR, -4,710 USD, -12,240 AED
Final 'Annual Package Price' row shows discounted totals: 960,000.1 INR, 18,840 USD, 48,960 AED
'Apply to Package Price' button visible in breakdown section
Clicking copies final_totals to Final Package Pricing fields
Tested: INR changed from 50000 to 1200000.12, USD from 600 to 23550, AED from 2200 to 61200
Source Tier dropdown shows for 'months' type programs only
Options: '1 Month', '3 Months', 'Annual'
Shows '-' text for 'sessions' type programs (Bi-Annual Downloads, Quarterly Meetups)
Discount % input shows for 'months' type programs only
Number input accepts percentage value
Shows '-' text for 'sessions' type programs
Final Package Pricing section at bottom shows INR/USD/AED/EUR/GBP input fields
Values can be edited manually
Helper text: 'Click Calculate Pricing → Apply to Package Price to auto-fill from programs'
Subscribers table loads with Priya Sharma
Expanding subscriber row shows EMI Schedule and Sessions & Programs sections
EMI Schedule: 6 EMIs with #1, #2 paid, #3 due, #4-6 pending
Sessions: Carry Fwd 2, Current 12, Due 1
Programs tags visible: Quad Layer Healing, AWRP, SoulSync NeuroHarmonics, Trauma Clearing
Student home API (/api/student/home) accessible with test session token
Returns financials with EMI data from subscriber
Returns package with session info from subscriber
Returns programs list from subscriber

seed_data_creation: Test config changes are restored to defaults after each test. Config restored to: package_name='Annual Healing Package', overall_discount_pct=0, all program discount_pct=0, source_tier='1 Month'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 78 tested the enhanced pricing config with calculate-pricing endpoint. Key features verified: 1) GET /api/admin/subscribers/calculate-pricing pulls prices from programs collection via fuzzy matching (AWRP matches 'Atomic Weight Release Program (AWRP)', MMM matches 'Money Magic Multiplier'). 2) Per-program source_tier and discount_pct fields work correctly. 3) Overall discount applies to final_totals. 4) UI shows programs as editable table with Source Tier dropdown and Discount % input only for 'months' type programs. 5) 'Apply to Package Price' button copies calculated final_totals to manual pricing fields. 6) All subscriber CRUD and student financials still work (regression passed).
